summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Near Misses and Suggestions feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All modals, pages, and admin actions working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check API
Backend: Dashboard stats include near_misses_new, near_misses_total, suggestions_new, suggestions_total
Backend: POST /api/near-misses creates near miss with name
Backend: POST /api/near-misses creates anonymous near miss (submitted_by is null)
Backend: GET /api/near-misses returns list of near misses
Backend: GET /api/near-misses/count returns new and total counts
Backend: POST /api/near-misses/{id}/acknowledge acknowledges near miss
Backend: POST /api/suggestions creates suggestion with name
Backend: POST /api/suggestions creates anonymous suggestion
Backend: POST /api/suggestions with different categories (safety, efficiency, equipment, other)
Backend: GET /api/suggestions returns list of suggestions
Backend: GET /api/suggestions/count returns new and total counts
Backend: PUT /api/suggestions/{id}/review marks as reviewed
Backend: PUT /api/suggestions/{id}/review marks as implemented
Backend: PUT /api/suggestions/{id}/review marks as declined
Backend: Dashboard stats update after creating near miss
Backend: Dashboard stats update after creating suggestion
Backend: Admin login with employee 4444
Frontend: Dashboard shows Near Misses card with count
Frontend: Dashboard shows Suggestions card with count
Frontend: Report Near Miss button opens modal
Frontend: Submit Suggestion button opens modal
Frontend: Near Miss modal has all fields (name, location, description, photos, anonymous checkbox)
Frontend: Suggestion modal has all fields (name, title, category, description, anonymous checkbox)
Frontend: Anonymous checkbox hides name field when checked
Frontend: Near miss submission works
Frontend: Suggestion submission works
Frontend: Anonymous near miss submission works
Frontend: Near Misses page loads with filter dropdown
Frontend: Near Misses page shows all reports with status badges
Frontend: Near Miss detail modal shows all data
Frontend: Acknowledge button works for admin
Frontend: Near Misses filter works (all, new, acknowledged)
Frontend: Suggestions page loads with filter dropdown
Frontend: Suggestions page shows all suggestions with status badges
Frontend: Suggestion detail modal shows all data
Frontend: Review buttons work (Mark Reviewed, Mark Implemented, Decline)
Frontend: Suggestions filter works (all, new, reviewed, implemented, declined)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Near Miss endpoints correctly implemented at lines 1830-1879 in server.py
Backend Suggestion endpoints correctly implemented at lines 1881-1934 in server.py
Dashboard stats correctly include near_misses_new, near_misses_total, suggestions_new, suggestions_total in cached_stats.py lines 119-138
Frontend Near Miss modal correctly handles anonymous submission (hides name field, sets submitted_by to null)
Frontend Suggestion modal correctly handles categories and anonymous submission
NearMissesPage component correctly displays reports with filter and admin acknowledge action
SuggestionsPage component correctly displays suggestions with status badges and admin review actions
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test near misses and suggestions during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Near Misses and Suggestions feature is fully implemented and working. Backend APIs support CRUD operations, anonymous submissions, and admin actions (acknowledge/review). Frontend has dashboard cards showing counts, action buttons to open modals, dedicated pages with filters, and detail modals with admin actions. Test data exists in the database with TEST_ prefix.
